mapper.select: select id, user_id, recipe_id, generated_post_id, checkin_date, content, media_ids_json, source_json, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from cook_checkins where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null limit 1

select id, user_id, recipe_id, generated_post_id, checkin_date, content, media_ids_json, source_json, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from cook_checkins where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null limit 1 for update

select c.id, c.user_id, c.recipe_id, rv.title as recipe_title, c.generated_post_id, c.checkin_date, c.content, c.media_ids_json, c.source_json, c.created_at from cook_checkins c left join cook_recipes r on r.id = c.recipe_id and r.deleted_at is null left join cook_recipe_versions rv on rv.id = r.current_version_id and rv.deleted_at is null where c.user_id = #{userId} and c.checkin_date = #{checkinDate} and c.deleted_at is null order by c.created_at desc, c.id desc

select c.id, c.user_id, c.recipe_id, rv.title as recipe_title, c.generated_post_id, c.checkin_date, c.content, c.media_ids_json, c.source_json, c.created_at from cook_checkins c left join cook_recipes r on r.id = c.recipe_id and r.deleted_at is null left join cook_recipe_versions rv on rv.id = r.current_version_id and rv.deleted_at is null where c.user_id = #{userId} and c.checkin_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} and c.deleted_at is null order by c.checkin_date desc, c.created_at desc, c.id desc
select distinct checkin_date from cook_checkins where user_id = #{userId} and deleted_at is null order by checkin_date desc
select count(1) from cook_checkins where user_id = #{userId} and deleted_at is null
select max(checkin_date) from cook_checkins where user_id = #{userId} and deleted_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into cook_checkins (user_id, recipe_id, generated_post_id, checkin_date, content, media_ids_json, source_json) values (#{userId}, #{recipeId}, #{generatedPostId}, #{checkinDate}, #{content}, #{mediaIdsJson}, #{sourceJson})
mapper.update: update cook_checkins set recipe_id = #{recipeId}, checkin_date = #{checkinDate}, content = #{content}, media_ids_json = #{mediaIdsJson}, source_json = #{sourceJson}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_checkins set generated_post_id = #{generatedPostId}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
